summary: Iteration 30: Phase 3/4 Catalog API and UI testing complete. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend Catalog Trauma page and Product Detail page fully functional with all required features.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - catalog endpoints are public
seed_data_creation: None - using existing catalog_products and catalog_skus collections with 44 high-confidence Trauma products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalog Phase 3/4 fully functional. Backend serves from catalog_products and catalog_skus collections. Only high-confidence, non-draft, review_required=false products are exposed. Pilot division is Trauma with 44 products across 12 categories and 6 brands. Product images served via /api/files/{storage_path}. SKUs come from catalog_skus collection linked by catalog_product_name.

GET /api/catalog/divisions.returns_trauma: PASS - Returns Trauma division with product_count, categories, brands

GET /api/catalog/products.pagination: PASS - page, limit, pages work correctly
GET /api/catalog/products.category_filter: PASS - Filters by category (e.g., Distal Radial Plates)
GET /api/catalog/products.search: PASS - Search by product name, SKU, brand

GET /api/catalog/products/{slug}.valid_slug: PASS - Returns full product detail with SKUs and related products
GET /api/catalog/products/{slug}.structure: PASS - Has product_name, brand, division, category, description, skus, related_products, enriched_from_shadow
GET /api/catalog/products/{slug}.sku_table: PASS - Returns 2 SKU variants for test product
GET /api/catalog/products/{slug}.related_products: PASS - Returns up to 6 related products

frontend_catalog_trauma.title: PASS - 'Trauma Division' with 'VERIFIED CATALOG' badge
frontend_catalog_trauma.search_bar: PASS - Search input and button functional
frontend_catalog_trauma.brand_sidebar: PASS - 6 brands listed (AURIC, Armar, CLAVO, KET, etc.)
frontend_catalog_trauma.product_grid: PASS - 18 products per page with images, brand badge, SKU count
frontend_catalog_trauma.grid_list_toggle: PASS - Toggle between grid and list view
frontend_catalog_trauma.active_filters: PASS - Shows applied filters with clear option

frontend_product_detail.breadcrumbs: PASS - Home > Products > Trauma > Category > Product Name
frontend_product_detail.product_family_section: PASS - Brand badge, division badge, category badge, name, description, key specs
frontend_product_detail.enrichment_badge: PASS - 'BROCHURE VERIFIED' badge for enriched products
frontend_product_detail.cta_buttons: PASS - Request Bulk Quote, WhatsApp Enquiry, Call Sales Team, Request Datasheet
frontend_product_detail.trust_badges: PASS - ISO 13485, CE Mark, CDSCO, Authorized Distributor
frontend_product_detail.sku_section: PASS - 'SKU / VARIANT INFORMATION' with table showing 2 variants
frontend_product_detail.sku_table: PASS - Columns: #, SKU Code, Product Name, Brand, Description, Source
frontend_product_detail.related_products: PASS - 'Similar Products' section with 4 related items
frontend_product_detail.quote_modal: PASS - Opens with form fields (name, hospital, phone, email, district, message)
frontend_product_detail.404_handling: PASS - Shows 'Product not found' for invalid slugs
